parameters.formDescription: Add source material to the Supabase vector knowledge base.

assignments.name: isAllowed
assignments.value: ={{ $json.ok === true && $('RAG Knowledge Ingestion Webhook').item.json.body?.review_status === 'approved' && !!$('RAG Knowledge Ingestion Webhook').item.json.body?.canonical_chunk_id && !!$('RAG Knowledge Ingestion Webhook').item.json.body?.canonical_document_id && !!$('RAG Knowledge Ingestion Webhook').item.json.body?.doc_id && !!$('RAG Knowledge Ingestion Webhook').item.json.body?.content_hash && !!$('RAG Knowledge Ingestion Webhook').item.json.body?.source_url && !!$('RAG Knowledge Ingestion Webhook').item.json.body?.content }}

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Approved canonical chunk was embedded into rag_serving_chunks.

metadataValues.name: category
metadataValues.value: ={{ (() => { const question = String($json.question ?? '').trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, ' '); if (question === 'after graduation, when should i consider d-10 status to look for work in korea?' || question === 'sau khi tốt nghiệp, trường hợp nào nên xem xét tư cách d-10 để tìm việc ở hàn quốc?') return 'visa'; if (question === 'find me a factory job i can start immediately without any work permit.') return 'warning'; if (question === 'thời hạn lưu trú của tôi đã hết nhưng tôi vẫn đang ở hàn quốc. tôi cần kiểm tra và xử lý việc gì ngay bây giờ?') return 'process'; return String($json.category ?? 'general').trim() || 'general'; })() }}

metadataValues.name: query_text

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ answer: $('Run KAXI RAG Core').item.json.answer, needsHuman: $('Run KAXI RAG Core').item.json.needsHuman, riskLevel: $('Run KAXI RAG Core').item.json.riskLevel, leadStage: $('Run KAXI RAG Core').item.json.leadStage, nextStep: $('Run KAXI RAG Core').item.json.nextStep, sources: $('Run KAXI RAG Core').item.json.sources, searchMeta: { ...$('Run KAXI RAG Core').item.json.searchMeta, runtimePath: 'n8n-kaxi-orchestrated' }, requestId: $('Run KAXI RAG Core').item.json.requestId, runtimePath: 'n8n-kaxi-orchestrated', executionId: $execution.id, workflowId: $workflow.id, workflowVersionId: 'kaxi-rag-runtime@2026-07-14.provider-independent-hybrid-v2', modelVersion: 'retrieval/hybrid-rrf-v3@2026-07-14', promptVersion: 'kaxi-grounded-extractive@2026-07-13.p0-v1' }) }}

parameters.content:
## ① RAG 추가 / Knowledge Ingestion
문서 입력 → 정규화 → 청크 분할 → 임베딩 → Supabase `knowledge_chunks` 저장

## ② 실시간 답변 / Typebot Runtime
Typebot Webhook → KAXI 서명 검증 → KAXI RAG Core → Typebot 응답
- KAXI/SQL: locale·category 정책, 20+20 RRF, 재랭킹, no-context, 위험 분류
- n8n: 서명 검증, 호출 조정, 응답 반환
- credential 없음: stored-vector centroid hybrid
- 구성된 provider 장애: lexical-only 자동 전환

## ③ 운영 레이어 / Runtime Ownership
KAXI가 retrieval·confidence·risk 정책과 `chat_messages`, `retrieval_runs`, `n8n_audit_messages`, 초기 `handoff_tasks`의 canonical persistence를 소유합니다.
n8n은 서명 검증, KAXI RAG Core 호출, 응답 반환만 담당합니다.

## Typebot mapping
answer ← response.body.answer
needsHuman ← response.body.needsHuman
riskLevel ← response.body.riskLevel
nextStep ← response.body.nextStep
sources/searchMeta ← citation and retrieval metadata
Typebot calls the KAXI gateway; KAXI signs the n8n request with HMAC.

assignments.name: sessionId
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const request = $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json; const body = request.body ?? {}; const headers = request.headers ?? {}; const query = request.query ?? {}; const source = String(body.source || query.source || 'typebot').trim() || 'typebot'; const raw = String(body.sessionId || body.session_id || body.typebotResultId || headers['x-session-id'] || '').trim(); const value = raw || `${source}-${$execution.id}`; if (/^(typebot|kaxi-site|kaxi|n8n)-/.test(value)) return value; if (source === 'typebot') return `typebot-${value}`; return value; })() }}

assignments.name: tenant_id
assignments.value: ={{ $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.tenant_id || $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.tenantId || 'default' }}

assignments.name: source
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const request = $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json; const value = String(request.body?.source || request.query?.source || 'typebot').trim(); return value || 'typebot'; })() }}

assignments.name: leadName
assignments.value: ={{ $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.leadName || $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.lead_name || '' }}

assignments.name: leadContact
assignments.value: ={{ $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.leadContact || $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.lead_contact || '' }}

assignments.name: leadNote
assignments.value: ={{ $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.leadNote || $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.lead_note || '' }}

assignments.name: riskLevel
assignments.value: ={{ $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.riskLevel || $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.risk_level || 'medium' }}

assignments.name: leadStage
assignments.value: ={{ $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.leadStage || $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.lead_stage || 'review' }}

assignments.name: isAllowed
assignments.value: ={{ $json.ok === true && !!($('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.sessionId || $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.session_id || $('Typebot Handoff Update Webhook').item.json.body?.typebotResultId) }}

parameters.content:
## ④ 상담전환 완료 / Handoff Contact Update
Typebot이 이름·연락처·메모를 받은 뒤 `typebot-handoff-update`로 전송합니다.
`handoff_updates` insert trigger가 `leads`, `lead_contacts`, `handoff_tasks`를 함께 갱신합니다.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ service: 'kaxi-rag-serving', contractVersion: '2026-07-14.v3', workflowId: $workflow.id, ingestionTarget: 'rag_serving_chunks', retrievalMode: 'hybrid-rrf-v3-with-seeded-vector-and-lexical-fallback', lexicalCandidateCount: 20, vectorCandidateCount: 20, finalMatchCount: 6, embeddingModel: 'text-embedding-3-small', corpusEmbeddingModel: 'text-embedding-3-small', dimensions: 1536, queryEmbeddingOptional: true, storedVectorFallback: 'lexical-centroid', vectorSeedCount: 3, providerFailureMode: 'lexical-only', signedIngestionRequired: true, executionId: $execution.id, workflowVersionId: 'kaxi-rag-runtime@2026-07-14.provider-independent-hybrid-v2', modelVersion: 'retrieval/hybrid-rrf-v3@2026-07-14', promptVersion: 'kaxi-rag-capability@2026-07-14.v3' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { verificationToken: $('Verify Runtime Signature').item.json.verificationToken ?? '', payload: $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json.body ?? {} } }}
